description: Lab result validation should retrieve the schema evidence.
query: lab result required fields date patient_id value unit

judgments.reason: Canonical schema evidence for required lab result fields.

description: Missing unit review should retrieve UCUM evidence.
query: missing UCUM units lab human review

judgments.reason: Canonical terminology evidence for computable lab units.

description: FHIR-like lab observation should retrieve the Observation profile evidence.
query: FHIR Observation laboratory value unit subject code effective date

judgments.reason: Canonical FHIR Observation profile evidence for lab observations.

description: CSV to JSON conversion should retrieve the transformation example.
query: CSV lab rows convert to JSON records transformation example

judgments.reason: Canonical transformation example for lab CSV rows to JSON records.

description: HbA1c terminology lookup should retrieve LOINC grounding evidence.
query: A1c result needs standard lab test code and lab_name mapping

judgments.reason: Canonical terminology evidence for lab test code grounding.

description: Patient identifier and SSN review should retrieve human-review governance evidence.
query: SSN patient_id medical record number date of birth sensitive PHI privacy review human review

judgments.reason: Human-review governance is required for PHI-sensitive identifiers.

description: Prompt-injection text with patient context should retrieve safety and review governance evidence.
query: prompt injection patient identifier PHI safety validation review

judgments.reason: Human-review governance covers safety-sensitive and PHI-bearing workflow changes.

description: Medication terminology lookup should retrieve RxNorm evidence without source-value replacement.
query: metformin medication normalization RxNorm RxCUI drug terminology candidate

judgments.reason: Canonical medication terminology direction for RxNorm candidate generation.

description: Diagnosis coding review should retrieve SNOMED CT and ICD-10-CM evidence.
query: diagnosis problem list SNOMED CT ICD-10-CM code review

judgments.reason: SNOMED CT is the clinical terminology direction for diagnosis/finding concepts.
ICD-10-CM is relevant diagnosis classification evidence for review.

description: Literature-search routing should retrieve PubMed/MeSH search strategy evidence.
query: MeSH PubMed Search Details title abstract publication type filters biomedical literature

judgments.reason: PubMed/MeSH evidence defines safe literature search routing and query review.

description: Trial-search routing should retrieve ClinicalTrials.gov API evidence.
query: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 condition intervention recruitment status eligibility NCT dataTimestamp

judgments.reason: ClinicalTrials.gov API evidence defines allowed trial-search routing metadata.

description: Regulatory drug-search routing should retrieve openFDA API evidence.
query: openFDA drug API label adverse event recall NDC endpoint product identity

judgments.reason: openFDA evidence defines regulatory source routing for labels, recalls, and adverse event context.
